creator: carl@stagecraft.cx
text:
Created attachment 189050
svn based diff file for update

Update comms/xastir to the latest stable version.

Issues:
. GraphicsMagick wasn't detected when the port was compiled with clang.  Now uses GCC instead as that is what GraphicsMagick is compiled with.
. Cleaned up Makefile based on portlint.
. Updated to latest stable version
